exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your mindfulness meditation forward
items: Download and set up a meditation timer app on your phone with customizable intervals
Research and identify 3 different meditation styles that interest you (e.g., mindfulness, loving-kindness, body scan)
Designate a specific quiet space in your home as your dedicated meditation area
Take a beginner-friendly meditation class or workshop to learn proper posture and breathing techniques
Create a daily meditation schedule and commit to a specific time for practice each day
Read one foundational book or complete an online course about mindfulness meditation principles
